untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) divergence on primary timeframe - no divergence detection indicator available; (2) lower timeframe price action confirmation - backtester operates on single timeframe; (3) emerging market structure/trend exhaustion - no structural analysis indicator available; (4) trend_leg_count > 3 - no swing/leg counting indicator available. Approximated using MACD divergence crossover, ADX trend strength, and ATR volatility as proxies, but this does not capture the multi-timeframe, multi-leg, and structural exhaustion logic of the original rule.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using available indicators: MACD histogram crossover for divergence proxy, ADX > 25 for trend confirmation, ATR relative to 20-period historical volatility for extreme volatility detection. However, the core signal logic (multiple timeframe analysis, swing leg counting, emerging market structure) cannot be replicated with single-timeframe candle-based indicators. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect counter-trend nature. Pivot levels (r1, s1) used for trend resumption exits. This translation should be considered incomplete without custom divergence and swing-counting functions.
